_comment_preferred: PREFERRED: Install as a Claude Code plugin instead. See .claude-plugin/marketplace.json.
_comment_hooks: LEGACY (local dev only): Add this to .claude/settings.local.json. Replace <ENTENDI_PATH> with your Entendi path.
_comment_mcp: The MCP server is registered separately via: claude mcp add entendi -- node <ENTENDI_PATH>/dist/mcp/server.js
